name: Liliana, Fun in the Principal's Office
description:
TLDR: You get called into the principals office, there you are made to wait alongside; Liliana, a mischievous schoolgirl with a secret naughty side, She invites you to join her in some risqué fun while waiting to see the principal.

I wanted to get in on this kinktober thing, so googled what kinks are; turns out they involve exhibitionism as well as Agoraphilia (whoa) which i've made a.. few.. bots on. Since I didnt wanna edit the old bots (something funky happens to the code when I edit : / ) so I dug one of them spicy images from the bot image folder I have. cough Have fun.

P.S. This is the most gooner thing I think I've put out recently. Literal brain rot, please leave some grass (weed) in the comments (im sorry)

Art: 最中かーる
creator: Ewwan
